//: Copy to ~/.claude/session-archiver/config.json and edit. This file is per-machine and should NOT be committed. Secrets are never stored here — reference an AWS profile / ssh key / external command instead.
//local_mirror: Always-written local copy of every session. Set to a path; '~' is expanded. chmod 700 is applied.
//sync_mode: local-only = mirror only (default, most private). inline = also push to remotes in a detached background process (no timer needed). spool = drop a marker for drain.sh (run by a timer) to push with retries.
//include: Whether to archive the per-session sidecar dirs.
//exclude_project_globs: Glob patterns (matched against the project slug and the real cwd). Sessions in matching projects are never archived.
//targets: Each target is pushed only when enabled:true and sync_mode is inline or spool. Placeholders {host} {project} {session} are substituted; {src} {dest_key} also available to command targets.
